title: cassia fasciculata var. robusta
intro: Cassia fasciculata var. robusta, also known as robust senna, is a plant species within the legume family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Cassia fasciculata var. robusta include its ability to stimulate bowel movements and reduce inflammation, which can be attributed to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Cassia fasciculata var. robusta include its potential to treat constipation, irritable bowel syndrome, and other digestive issues. Cassia fasciculata var. robusta can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its long history of use by indigenous communities.
